description: Machine-readable ledger for stale native GPU product-path dependencies. Product-forbidden rows must stay absent from release UX product reports while typed replacements land.

rows.negative_gate: product_proof_built_pre_present must be false in the linked preview-loop report
rows.removal_condition: keep this negative gate until product reports no longer carry the pre-present proof boolean field

rows.typed_replacement: post-present proof request handles registered after present
rows.negative_gate: pre_present_proof_request_count must be zero for release UX
rows.removal_condition: keep this negative gate until product reports no longer carry the pre-present request counter field

rows.typed_replacement: async latest-wins report writer plus scalar product commits
rows.negative_gate: hot_path_report_serialization_count must be zero on product reports
rows.removal_condition: delete product-path full JSON report assembly after product/proof/report split gates are stable

rows.negative_gate: hot_path_report_write_count must be zero on product reports
rows.removal_condition: remove synchronous product-frame report writes after async report freshness gates cover all native UX reports
remove address-specific compatibility after all examples use generic selected-node/source-binding route metadata

rows.current_owner: boon_runtime list/currentness contract as observed by native UX report
rows.typed_replacement: indexed List/find and demand-current visible read barriers
rows.negative_gate: total_list_find_rows_scanned must be zero for release product clicks
rows.removal_condition: remove scan fallback acceptance once generic indexed lookup fixtures cover non-Cells lists
